form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 12 at Toulouse on March 18 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Amusante with 60kg at $8.70. Before that 2nd in a small field at Toulouse on March 1 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Vaticana with 57kg at $23. Will find this tough; prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). Last start 3rd of 12 at Toulouse on March 18 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Amusante with 60kg at $8.70. Before that 2nd in a small field at Toulouse on March 1 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind Vaticana with 57kg at $23. Will find this tough; prefer others.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, 2nd of 7 at Pau All Weather on January 11 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Testify with 58kg at $4.60. Second-up won by 0.5 len at Chantilly All Weather February 20 over 1300m defeating Tanques with 58kg at $13. Progressive type who is a strong top-three hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6). Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, 2nd of 7 at Pau All Weather on January 11 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Testify with 58kg at $4.60. Second-up won by 0.5 len at Chantilly All Weather February 20 over 1300m defeating Tanques with 58kg at $13. Progressive type who is a strong top-three hope.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won won by 2 len at Chantilly All Weather March 23 over 1300m defeating Westminster Cherry with 56kg at $4. Has upside and can make it back-to-back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(10). Was well-supported at debut, won won by 2 len at Chantilly All Weather March 23 over 1300m defeating Westminster Cherry with 56kg at $4. Has upside and can make it back-to-back wins.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign won by 2 len Chantilly All Weather November 21 over 1500m defeating Musical Rose with 57kg at $2.10. Previously first up; third of 8 at Niort September 14 over 1400m, soft track; 6 len behind Darinice carrying 56.5kg. See how he returns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). First-up. Finished off last campaign won by 2 len Chantilly All Weather November 21 over 1500m defeating Musical Rose with 57kg at $2.10. Previously first up; third of 8 at Niort September 14 over 1400m, soft track; 6 len behind Darinice carrying 56.5kg. See how he returns.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 7 at this track on March 10 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind The Best Glory with 55.5kg at $2.60. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Chantilly on July 8 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Vardif carrying 56.5kg at $8.20. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 7 at this track on March 10 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind The Best Glory with 55.5kg at $2.60. Previously second-up 2nd in a small field at Chantilly on July 8 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Vardif carrying 56.5kg at $8.20. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 38 days. Last run 5th of 7 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1600m, 8 len behind Moonlabel with 55.5kg at $12. At only start last preparation 3rd of 7 at Strasbourg on November 11 over 1550m, 10 len behind Marylene Du Serre carrying 55.5kg at $6.50. No easier this time and looks tested again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Second-up today. Not raced for 38 days. Last run 5th of 7 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1600m, 8 len behind Moonlabel with 55.5kg at $12. At only start last preparation 3rd of 7 at Strasbourg on November 11 over 1550m, 10 len behind Marylene Du Serre carrying 55.5kg at $6.50. No easier this time and looks tested again.

form.formComment: Freshened since claiming her maiden victory on debut; won by 1.0 len at Toulouse March 1 over 1600m defeating Solikhiev carrying 56.5kg at $14. Will take a lot from that run and is sure to play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(13.5). Freshened since claiming her maiden victory on debut; won by 1.0 len at Toulouse March 1 over 1600m defeating Solikhiev carrying 56.5kg at $14. Will take a lot from that run and is sure to play a big role.
